title: FEAR: HOW TO CONQUER? HG AMITASANA DAS | GITA LIFE Live

segments.text: Hare Krishna, a warm welcome to all of you for today's Gita Live session.
The topic for the day is fear, how to conquer.
All of us will go through situations, circumstances when we will be having some kind of fear or fearful situations.
There are many tips in the Bhagavad Gita, many insights which we can gather from the instructions of Lord Shri Krishna.
Where we can go through these fearful situations without getting bewildered, without getting overwhelmed, with confidence, with faith in the Lord.
And this is what we are going to discuss today in the session.
